0.original: Start your mental engine mechanically. 2 00:00:03,440 --> 00:00:08,769 An aspiring young writer who wasn't experiencing success made this confession. 3 00:00:09,200 --> 00:00:14,370 My trouble is, whole days and weeks pass that I can't get a thing written. 4 00:00:14,880 --> 00:00:18,130 You see, he remarked, writing is creative. 5 00:00:18,240 --> 00:00:19,890 You've got to be inspired. 6 00:00:20,000 --> 00:00:21,970 Your spirit must move you. 7 00:00:22,720 --> 00:00:28,210 True, writing is creative, but here's how another creative man, also a writer, 8 00:00:28,400 --> 00:00:33,490 explained his secret for producing quantities of successful material. 9 00:00:34,320 --> 00:00:37,650 I use a mind-force technique," he began. 10 00:00:37,920 --> 00:00:42,289 I've got deadlines to meet, and I can't wait for my spirit to move me. 11 00:00:42,400 --> 00:00:44,370 I've got to move my spirit. 12 00:00:44,560 --> 00:00:46,210 Here's how my method works. 13 00:00:46,400 --> 00:00:48,850 I make myself sit down at my desk. 14 00:00:48,960 --> 00:00:53,170 Then I pick up a pencil and go through mechanical motions of writing. 15 00:00:53,279 --> 00:00:54,610 I put down anything. 16 00:00:54,800 --> 00:00:55,809 I doodle. 17 00:00:55,920 --> 00:01:01,089 I get my fingers and arm in motion, and sooner or later, without my being conscious of it, 18 00:01:01,279 --> 00:01:03,650 my mind gets on the right track. 19 00:01:04,560 --> 00:01:09,250 Sometimes, of course, I get ideas out of the blue when I'm not trying to write, 20 00:01:09,250 --> 00:01:12,289 " he went on, but these are just bonuses. 21 00:01:12,720 --> 00:01:16,769 Most of the good ideas come from just getting to work. 22 00:01:17,519 --> 00:01:19,809 Action must precede action. 23 00:01:19,920 --> 00:01:21,410 That's a law of nature. 24 00:01:21,600 --> 00:01:27,250 Nothing starts itself, not even the dozens of mechanical gadgets we use daily. 25 00:01:28,160 --> 00:01:34,850 Your home is heated automatically, but you must select, take action, the temperature you want. 26 00:01:35,200 --> 00:01:40,289 Your car shifts gears automatically only after you have set the right lever. 27 00:01:40,560 --> 00:01:43,650 The same principle applies to mind action. 28 00:01:43,920 --> 00:01:47,328 You get your mind in gear to make it produce for you. 29 00:01:48,480 --> 00:02:00,690 A young branch sales manager for a door-to-door sales organization explained how he trained his sales force the mechanical way to start each day earlier and more successfully. 30 00:02:01,600 --> 00:02:08,450 There's a tremendous resistance to the door-to-door salesman, as anyone who has ever sold house-to-house knows, 31 00:02:08,480 --> 00:02:14,930 he commented, and it's hard, even for the veteran salesman, to make that first call in the morning. 32 00:02:15,279 --> 00:02:20,850 He knows the odds are pretty good that he'll get some pretty rough treatment before the day is over. 33 00:02:21,039 --> 00:02:24,930 So it's natural for him to put off getting started in the morning. 34 00:02:25,039 --> 00:02:28,465 He'll drink a couple of extra cups of coffee, maybe cruise around the neighborhood a while,
0.b1: Start your brain like a machine.
0.cn: 像启动机器一样启动你的大脑。
0.ai_notes:
'mental engine': a metaphor for the brain's ability to start working or thinking.
'mechanically': doing something automatically or by habit without needing deep thought or inspiration.
'aspiring': someone who is working hard to become successful in a specific career.
'confession': a statement where someone admits to a personal weakness or failure.
'inspired': feeling a sudden, creative urge to do something.
'spirit must move you': a phrase meaning you need to feel a strong internal desire or motivation to act.
'quantities': a large amount of something.
'mind-force technique': a personal strategy to control one's own thoughts and productivity.
'deadlines': a specific time or date by which a task must be finished.
'doodle': to draw simple shapes or patterns while thinking about something else.
'on the right track': making progress or moving in the correct direction.
'out of the blue': happening suddenly and unexpectedly.
'bonuses': extra rewards or benefits beyond what is expected.
'precede': to happen or come before something else.
'mechanical gadgets': small, useful machines or devices.
'in gear': a state of being ready to work or function effectively.
'branch sales manager': a person in charge of a local office for a larger company.
'door-to-door': a method of selling where a person visits homes to offer products directly to residents.
'tremendous resistance': a very strong feeling of opposition or unwillingness from others.
'veteran': someone who has a lot of experience in a particular field.
'the odds are pretty good': a way of saying it is very likely to happen.
'rough treatment': being spoken to or handled in an unkind or impolite way.
'put off': to delay or postpone doing something.
'cruise around': to drive or move slowly through an area without a specific destination.
0.remarks:
'mental engine': 比喻大脑开始工作或思考的能力。
'mechanically': 机械地，指不经深思或灵感，习惯性地自动完成某事。
'aspiring': 有抱负的，指为在特定职业中取得成功而努力的人。
'confession': 坦白，指承认个人弱点或失败的陈述。
'inspired': 受到启发的，指感到一种突然的创作冲动去做某事。
'spirit must move you': 意为需要感受到强烈的内在欲望或动力去行动。
'quantities': 大量。
'mind-force technique': 一种控制个人思想和生产力的个人策略。
'deadlines': 截止日期，任务必须完成的具体时间或日期。
'doodle': 涂鸦，指在思考别的事情时随手画出的简单形状或图案。
'on the right track': 走在正确的轨道上，指正在取得进展或朝着正确的方向前进。
'out of the blue': 出乎意料地，突然发生。
'bonuses': 奖金，指超出预期的额外奖励或福利。
'precede': 在……之前发生。
'mechanical gadgets': 机械小装置，指小型且有用的机器或设备。
'in gear': 准备好工作或有效运作的状态。
'branch sales manager': 分公司销售经理，负责大公司下属当地办事处的人。
'door-to-door': 上门推销，指通过拜访住户直接提供产品给居民的销售方式。
'tremendous resistance': 巨大的阻力，指来自他人的强烈反对或不情愿。
'veteran': 老手，指在特定领域有丰富经验的人。
'the odds are pretty good': 很有可能，指某事发生的几率很高。
'rough treatment': 粗暴对待，指以不友善或无礼的方式说话或处理事情。
'put off': 推迟，延期做某事。
'cruise around': 漫无目的地巡游，指在某个区域缓慢驾驶或移动。
